reasoning: RULE D applies: query is German (de) but all notes/descriptions returned in English, so constraint_handling drops 1 from otherwise-deserved 4 to 3. Per RULE B, only constraint_handling is docked; other dims are scored on data quality. The canonical_rural_railway_villages block (Iiyama/Koumi/Yodo/Tadami lines + QIDs + frequency notes) directly addresses rural-train travel intent — strong intent_understanding (4, one caveat: no coverage of Tohoku/Kyushu lines). Wikidata QIDs present throughout, factual claims verified (Nobeyama highest JR station, Tadami 3 round-trips/day). Practical_usefulness 4: excellent planning data but no seasonal advice or booking caveats.
missing_data: German-language descriptions/notes for the villages and lines; coverage of additional iconic rural lines (e.g. Asa Kaigan, Gono Line, Hisatsu Orange Railway); seasonal travel tips (snow closures on Tadami, spring cherry blossoms on Koumi).
improvement_hint: When lang=de is passed, translate the 'note' and 'frequency_note' fields in canonical_rural_railway_villages to German (or at minimum surface the 17-lang description via get_description). Also expand canonical rural railway coverage to include Tohoku and Kyushu iconic lines.
